violations.description: Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --In-use utensil was not properly stored during pauses in food preparation or dispensing. -Scoops in small containers with no handles.
Preventing contamination by consumers. — --Food on display for self service was not properly protected by food guards, display cases, or similarly effective means. -No sneeze guard on the salad bar.
Plumbing system. — --Plumbing system was not designed, constructed, operated and/or maintained according to regulation. -Containers catching condensation in the walk in cooler.
Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item was not properly protected from potential contamination. -Condensation dripping into pans in the walk in cooler above food.
Preventing contamination by consumers. — --Food on display for self service was not properly protected by food guards, display cases, or similarly effective means. -No sneeze guard on the salad bar.
Storage of cleaned equipment and utensils. — --Clean equipment/utensil was not covered or inverted during storage. -Clean plates and bowls on the salad bar are not inverted.
Plumbing system. — --Plumbing system was not designed, constructed, operated and/or maintained according to regulation. -Condensation is dripping into pans in the walk in cooler.
Clean/dry location, protected, covered, original containers, labeled (2 pts deducted)
